recommendations.title: Ride in the Whirlwind
recommendations.overview: Three cowboys, mistaken for members of an outlaw gang, are relentlessly pursued by a posse.

recommendations.title: The Shooting
recommendations.overview: Two miners agree to guide a mysterious woman, who has appeared in their camp from nowhere, to a nearby town; but soon, because of her erratic behavior, they begin to suspect that her true purpose is quite different.

recommendations.title: Mysterious Skin
recommendations.overview: A teenage hustler and a young man obsessed with alien abductions cross paths, together discovering a horrible, liberating truth.

recommendations.title: Bad Cat
recommendations.overview: A foul-mouthed cat and its gang cross paths with humans.

recommendations.title: Racer and the Jailbird
recommendations.overview: When Gino meets racing driver Bénédicte, it's love at first sight. But Gino has a secret. The kind of secret that can endanger their lives.
